meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
count(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID`) AS C1
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual Start Date`,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual End Date`)) AS C1
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
select (Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Duration Seconds`)) AS C1
from `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`
where 
((`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Unavailability Type` = 'Unscheduled Full') OR (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Unavailability Type` = 'Unscheduled Partial'))
and (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Name`= $service) and (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` >= $__from/1000 
and `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` <= $__to/1000) and `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Data Set Id`= 'BMC.ASSET'

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
count(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID`) AS C1
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Scheduled') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
--AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` <= $__to/1000

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
count(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID`) AS C1,
Date(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date`) as __time__
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000
group by __time__
order by __time__

SELECT 
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual Start Date`,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual End Date`)) AS C1,
Date(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date`) as __time__
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
--AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000
group by __time__

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
sum(case when `Change Request Status` = 'Closed' AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Status Reason` in ('Backed Out','Unsuccessful') then 1 else 0 end) * 100/
count(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID`) AS rate
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000

SELECT 
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual Start Date`,`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Actual End Date`)) AS C1,
SubStr(datename('mm',`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date`),0,2)+ ' '+upper(Year(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date`)) AS monthyr,
DATE(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date`) as dateParam 
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Completed','Closed') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000
group by monthyr, dateParam
order by dateParam

panels.title: Mean Time to Restore Service by Month

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID` AS C1
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
count(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Request ID`) AS C1,
SubStr(datename('mm',`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date`),0,2)+ ' '+upper(Year(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date`)) AS monthyr
--`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` as dateParam 
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` in ('Scheduled') 
AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
--AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled Start Date` <= $__to/1000
group by monthyr

select
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as 'Open Incidents',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`= $service)
GROUP BY
__time__
Order By `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` ASC

select
SUM(CASE WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` < 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as 'Open Changes',
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE (`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000) and (`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI`= $service)
GROUP BY
__time__
Order By `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` ASC

panels.title: Health Score, Events, Incidents and Changes

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submitter` AS Submitter,
   (case when `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` is null then 'Unknown' else `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` end)  AS CoordinatorGroup,
   COUNT(DISTINCT(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID`)) Changes
FROM `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
WHERE (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` IN ('Completed', 'Closed')
   AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` in ($service)
   AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` <= $__to/1000
)
GROUP BY 
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submitter`,
   case when `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` is null then 'Unknown' else `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` end
